## SEO Checklist

For any page changes, verify:

- [ ] Unique title (50–60 characters)
- [ ] Unique description (150–160 characters)
- [ ] Canonical URL
- [ ] Open Graph tags
- [ ] Structured data (JSON-LD) if applicable
- [ ] Sitemap updated if adding a route

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with zero errors
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport
- [ ] Verified accessibility (semantic HTML, ARIA labels, alt text)
